title: crotalaria pteropoda
intro: Crotalaria pteropoda, also known as the Butterfly Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family. This plant is traditionally used in various forms of folk medicine, particularly in Africa, to treat various health conditions. The leaves and flowers of Crotalaria pteropoda are believed to have medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or dried powder to be used as a remedy for various ailments.
